nasb.text: And he must have a good reputation with those outside the church, so that he will not fall into reproach and the snare of the devil.

esv.text: Moreover, he must be well thought of by outsiders, so that he may not fall into disgrace, into a snare of the devil.

cnv.text: 作監督的也必須在教外有好聲譽，免得他被人毀謗，就落在魔鬼的陷阱裡。

ccb.text: 做监督的在教会以外也必须有好名声，以免被人指责，陷入魔鬼的圈套。

csbs.text: 同时，做监督的在外人中也必须有好名声，免得受人责骂，落在魔鬼的网罗里。
